title: kyllinga hyalina
intro: Kyllinga hyalina, also known as water pygmy-perch sedge, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kyllinga hyalina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help manage diabetes. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
